narrative:
Newport (precinct in Washington County) has 1,352 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
